_meta.name: ALM 70B launch-ready state — launcher+FSDP+preflight+download shipped, awaiting 7 upstream gates
_meta.mode: launcher+FSDP+preflight+download hexa SSOTs prepared locally; awaiting A2 chain + FSDP smoke + 4-pod auth before pod prep + launch

status: PREP_NEAR_COMPLETE — 6 gates closed (D1/D2/D3 A2 chain DONE, D5 FSDP smoke PASS, D6 corpus 93M, D8 CLM slot freed via pod_dead). 1 FAILED (D4 A2 eval regression → pivot r9+pathc). 3 open (D7 user_ok, D9 72B download, D10 4-pod alloc).
gate_verdict: GREEN for prep (all 5 artifacts shipped + D1/D2/D3/D5/D6/D8 RESOLVED). YELLOW for D4 (FAILED with pivot plan). RED for launch (D7 user OK + D9 download + D10 4-pod alloc still open).
ready_for_launch_rationale: D1-D3 A2 chain COMPLETE (A1 best_loss 1.7287, A2-Orch done, A2-Tool done). D4 FAILED — A2-Tool 50-example seed overfit + serve process exit caused hire_sim regression 0.5667 vs 0.8111 baseline. Pivot r9+pathc decided. D5 FSDP recipe VALIDATED on 2xH100 (PASS $1.10). D6 corpus READY (93M chars). Remaining: (a) USER_OK_4POD=1 user decision; (b) D4 pivot execution (serve migration + corpus expansion); (c) 72B base download (pod-only, post D10); (d) 4-pod allocation (post D7).

launcher_hexa.role: SSOT launcher — emits pod-side bash runner to /tmp/_launch_alm_70b_runner.sh at execution time (same pattern as launch_alm_a2_orch.hexa)
guardrails: torch 2.4.x + peft 0.13.2 + transformers 4.45.2 + flash_attn 2.6.x + NO bitsandbytes
ckpt dir fresh (never reused, MFS quota policy)

config_json.role: launcher config SSOT — launcher reads this to verify ckpt_label=production + dependency chain

frozen_hyperparams.target_modules: q_proj k_proj v_proj o_proj gate_proj up_proj down_proj (7 modules, attn+MLP)

fsdp_config_json.role: FSDP recipe SSOT (JSON); launcher emits equivalent YAML to /workspace/alm_70b_fsdp_config.yaml at runtime

download_hexa.role: 72B base model download driver — emits pod runner to /tmp/_download_qwen72b_runner.sh
download_hexa.pod_only_policy: MUST download on pod, NOT local (per spec O5 — local 80 Mbps = 4-5h + disk pressure on 283 GB free)

preflight_hexa.role: 40-check preflight gate — all 40 must PASS before launch
preflight_hexa.usage_local: hexa run training/alm_70b_preflight.hexa  # SKIPs on-pod checks

structure.alm70b/r1/step_100/: FSDP SHARDED_STATE_DICT — rank0.safetensors, rank1.safetensors, rank2.safetensors, rank3.safetensors + optimizer states

D1_A1_done.description: ALM 14B A1 (Qwen2.5-14B + r4 resume + phi-aware LoRA) step 3000 adapter
D1_A1_done.status: RESOLVED 2026-04-17 — step 3000 done, best_loss=1.7287, phi_holo=9051.72, duration=110.6min, ckpt=/workspace/ckpt_alm14b_phi_a1_20260416/step_3000. See shared/state/alm_training_status_20260417.json.

D2_A2_Orch_done.description: ALM 14B A2-Orch (A1 merged + Orch-OR LoRA) step 3000

D3_A2_Tool_done.description: ALM 14B A2-Tool (A1+A2-Orch merged + tool-use LoRA) step 1500
D3_A2_Tool_done.status: RESOLVED 2026-04-17 — step 1500 done, loss=0.0668, duration=46.5min, marker=READY_A2_TOOL_DONE, ckpt=/workspace/ckpt_alm14b_phi_a2_tool_20260417/step_1500. CAVEAT: 50-example seed corpus → overfit, caused D4 regression.

D4_A2_eval_pass.description: Final eval on A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool merged: hire_sim lenient >= 0.85 AND tool-use preserved
D4_A2_eval_pass.status: FAILED 2026-04-17 — hire_sim_lenient=0.5667 vs baseline 0.8111 (regression). Root cause = A2-Tool 50-example seed overfit + serve_a2_tool_eval.py process exit (Py ban blocks direct restart). Pivot decided: r9+pathc path (serve_alm_native.hexa migration OR hexa-native FFI). See shared/state/hire_sim_regression_20260417.json.
D4_A2_eval_pass.pivot_plan: r9+pathc: expand A2-Tool corpus beyond 50 examples (reduces overfit) + migrate serve to serving/serve_alm_native.hexa (unblocks eval without Py ban violation)

D5_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.description: 2xH100 FSDP smoke on 14B (50 steps) — validates accelerate+peft FSDP save/load/merge round-trip
D5_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.status: RESOLVED 2026-04-17T02:50Z — Path A delivered + D5 smoke PASS on 2xH100 SXM. 50 steps @ 78 step/min, losses bounded [13.52, 16.37] no NaN, SHARDED_STATE_DICT save produced 2 rank shards, merge_fsdp_weights PASS with 56GB model.safetensors (1251 tensors, 672 LoRA keys). Two mid-run fixes applied to train_alm_14b.hexa (uncommitted): FIX-1 bf16 cast after peft wrap under --fsdp (resolves mixed-dtype FlatParam error), FIX-2 merge_fsdp_weights subdir path (pytorch_model_fsdp_0/). Pod 22xbw58cqajko3 deleted. Cost $1.10 of $30 budget. Full evidence: shared/state/alm_14b_fsdp_smoke_20260417.json.
D5_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.pods_actual_note: Single pod with 2xH100 SXM (NVLink intra-node). No multi-pod needed for FSDP smoke.
D5_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.rationale: Per spec blockers.R1_FSDP_CORRECTNESS + checklist G5. 72B FSDP burn ($240-480) with unvalidated recipe is unacceptable. Recipe validated.
D5_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.path_taken: Path A (sibling patched train_alm_14b.hexa with +120 LoC FSDP plumbing) + D5 executor applied 2 empirical fixes mid-run (uncommitted)
fixes_applied_during_smoke: FIX-1: `model = model.to(torch.bfloat16)` after peft wrap under --fsdp (PEFT fp32 LoRA + bf16 base caused FSDP FlatParam uniform-dtype error)
FIX-2: `merge_fsdp_weights(step_N/pytorch_model_fsdp_0, ...)` subdir path (save_state nests distcp shards under pytorch_model_fsdp_0/ where .metadata lives)
findings_applicable_to_70b_launch: bf16 uniformity cast auto-applies to 70B via same trainer — no 70B-side change needed
merge_fsdp_weights subdir fix also auto-applies to 70B post-training merge
activation_checkpointing=True in FullyShardedDataParallelPlugin did NOT auto-apply on accelerate 0.34.2; manual gradient_checkpointing_enable() required. Both paths kept for safety.
PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True emits 'not supported on this platform' warning on H100 SXM — cosmetic; consider removing from alm_70b_fsdp_config.json
libnccl-net.so missing on runpod/pytorch:2.4.0 image — falls back to internal socket; no impact on single-node NVLink

Step speed baseline: 77-78 step/min at seq=512 batch=1 grad_ckpt=ON on 14B LoRA r=16 + 2xH100 (NVLink, bf16 MixedPrecision reduce=fp32); 70B at seq=1024 batch=1 grad_ckpt=ON on 4xH100 r=32 should be ~4-6 step/min per alm_70b_config est

D6_corpus_expansion.description: Korean+reasoning corpus 4M -> 40M+ chars (KoAlpaca + KMMLU-instruct + KoBEST + hire_sim full)
D6_corpus_expansion.status: RESOLVED 2026-04-17T10:55 — 93.4M chars (90283 records) at training/corpus_alm_70b.jsonl and r2:anima-models/corpus/corpus_alm_70b.jsonl (state file: shared/state/alm_70b_corpus_20260417.json)
D6_corpus_expansion.fallback: log shared/state/alm_70b_corpus_exception.json and launch undersized (accepts memorization risk)

post_mortem_constraint_added_20260417.lesson: 14B A2-Tool regressed to 0.5667 from 50-example tool corpus × 1500 steps
enforce: tool-use seed corpus (50 examples) weight <1% of total chars
dilute with >=40M chars of broad instruction-following data

Cascades: D9 72B download now actionable (pod-only), D10 4-pod allocation now actionable.

D7_user_ok_4pod.status: GRANTED 2026-04-17 — user chat directive 'D7 승인'. USER_OK_4POD=1 active for the 70B launch.

D8_clm_r4_slot_freed.description: CLM r4 pod (u744u0lbts5v1w) terminates OR user authorizes simultaneous 5-pod total (exceeds all caps)
D8_clm_r4_slot_freed.status: RE-OCCUPIED 2026-04-17T08:52Z — CLM r4 relaunched on NEW pod abx2uqoa7qbbh8 (H100 NVL) after 20260416 death. Does NOT re-block 70B because (a) CLM uses H100 NVL fleet, 70B uses H100 SXM fleet — physically distinct allocations on RunPod, (b) dual-track mandate (feedback_dual_track) requires CLM+ALM parallel.
D8_clm_r4_slot_freed.eta: N/A — CLM is parallel track, NOT a 70B blocker
D8_clm_r4_slot_freed.reclassification_rationale: Per task context: 're-occupies the slot but does NOT block 70B (CLM is parallel track, not 70B dependency)'. Fleet separation (NVL vs SXM) means RunPod-side allocations do not conflict.

D9_72b_base_downloaded.status: NOT STARTED (pod-only task — defer until 4-pod allocated per policy O5)

D10_pod_allocation.description: 4xH100 SXM 80GB single-node pod provisioned with >= 500 GB disk + runpod/pytorch:2.4.0-py3.11-cuda12.4.1 image

step_0_prep_local: # Verify all 5 artifacts present + dry-run launcher
ls -la training/launch_alm_70b.hexa training/alm_70b_config.json training/alm_70b_fsdp_config.json training/download_qwen72b.hexa training/alm_70b_preflight.hexa
DRY_RUN=1 hexa run training/launch_alm_70b.hexa    # verify emits runner
hexa run training/alm_70b_preflight.hexa           # local preflight (SKIPs on-pod)
step_2_setup_pod: # SSH in + install deps + anima repo
cd /workspace && git clone <anima_repo> anima && cd anima
pip install transformers==4.45.2 peft==0.13.2 accelerate>=0.31.0 flash-attn==2.6.3
pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i bitsandbytes && echo REFUSE || echo OK
step_4_fetch_corpus: # Corpus already on R2 (assembled during D6 expansion)
step_5_preflight_40_of_40: # ANY FAIL = abort launch, diagnose, fix
step_7_monitor: #   step 50: eval_loss[50] vs eval_loss[10] -- abort if regress
#   step 150: ce_loss descent vs base -- abort if flat
#   step 200: hire_sim lenient mini-eval -- abort if < 0.80
step_8_post_training: # Merge FSDP sharded adapter -> single adapter_model.bin
# Promotion decision: if hire_sim >= 0.90 + ce_loss < 1.5 + phi_holo > 3000 -> production; else r1_failed

cost_breakdown.vs_extreme_accel_budget: total_target $324 EXCEEDS $400 session-cap on cap case. Explicit user OK required.

pod_spec.node_topology: single-node NVLink (3.6 TB/s aggregate, 900 GB/s per GPU)
pod_spec.ram_rationale: FSDP cpu_ram_efficient_loading=true caches full state_dict on rank 0 at load. 256GB marginal, 512GB comfortable.
pod_spec.disk_provisioning_note: MUST be set at pod creation — cannot resize non-destructively on RunPod
pod_spec.image_rationale: Matches r7/r8a/A1 verified. DO NOT upgrade torch >= 2.6 (peft + flash-attn compat breaks per memory:reference_peft_torch_compat)

eta_timeline.t_plus_24h: A2 final eval PASS/FAIL decision (gate G1)
eta_timeline.t_plus_48h: 14B FSDP smoke test run (gate G5, 2 pods, $24)
eta_timeline.t_plus_152h_launch_candidate: all gates PASS -> USER_OK_4POD -> preflight 40/40 -> launch

blocker_precise.single_most_important: D5 RESOLVED — FSDP recipe validated. Remaining gates: D1-D4 (A2 chain completion), D6 (corpus expansion WARN, 93M chars at training/corpus_alm_70b.jsonl already satisfies 40M+), D7 USER_OK_4POD, D8 CLM r4 slot free, D9 72B download, D10 4xH100 alloc.

compliance.one_shot_evidence: 40-check preflight gate; USER_OK_4POD env guard; 7 upstream gates enforced by spec trigger_gate; abort gates at steps 50/150/200.
compliance.version_in_filename_evidence: alm70b-r1-{date}, alm_70b_*.hexa, alm_70b_*.json — r1 is round, not version; '70b' is param count not version.
compliance.background_evidence: launch step 6 uses tmux new-session -d. download driver honors DRY_RUN=1.

compliance.no_commit_evidence: No git commit issued this session. All files staged but uncommitted.
compliance.dual_track_evidence: CLM track continues independently (r4 pod u744u0lbts5v1w); ALM track is this 70B prep.
